refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imlocalcontrast(image) out = imlocalcontrast(image, sigma, amount)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Subtracts a Gaussian local background and adds the scaled detail component. Output is double-valued in the range 0 to 1.

refsection.title: Examples
